_comment: Repository-agnostic MCP configuration for the Claude Code agentic framework. All credentials are env-var placeholders — set them in your environment or via .mcp/configurations/.env (never commit real secrets). See .mcp/servers/*.md for per-server setup. Comment out any server you are not using; servers needing credentials will fail to start until their env vars are set.

env._note: Microsoft Learn docs search. If unavailable in your registry, swap for an equivalent docs-search server (e.g. context7) in .mcp/configurations/.
Filesystem-backed analysis surface scoped to source + architecture docs. Used by the architecture-reviewer to read code/diagrams. Adjust the paths to your repo layout.
Software-composition analysis via the OSV vulnerability database. If unavailable, substitute another SCA MCP server. Pair with `dotnet list package --vulnerable` in CI.
SAST/secret/dependency scanning. Replace with your organization's security MCP server (Snyk, Trivy, Defender, etc.) and matching token env var.
